summary: This specification defines standard functions outlining a `consumer` role for instance(s) of [EIP-721](./eip-721.md). An implementation allows reading the current `consumer` for a given NFT (`tokenId`) along with a standardized event for when an `consumer` has changed. The proposal depends on and extends the existing [EIP-721](./eip-721.md).
title: EIP-721 Consumable Extension
